events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail** — foam substituted for the required fire-rated sealant at a fireblocking/draftstopping location invalidates the fire/smoke-resistance rating (IRC R302/R302.11). Since it's still rough-complete (not yet covered), the corrective path is straightforward: remove the foam, install the specified listed firestop sealant, and re-inspect before closing in — flagged as high risk given the life-safety function of fireblocking.
